items.raw_desc: Tartozék kertészkedéshez SUStee Utántöltő, M, 2 db:SUStee is a Japanese brand of smart soil moisture indicators. With its simple, elegant design and patented technology, it helps growers easily know when it's time to water their plants. The replacement sensor core for SUStee soil moisture meters is influenced by the soil condition. Sustee's replaceable cores are made from natural fibres and are degradable by microorganisms. Core replacement is influenced by the condition of the soil, but generally speaking, the core should be replaced when it stops turning blue after watering (after about 6-9 months).
